current_summary: This file records the historical H0_obs likelihood-fix validation stage. The canonical current Tier-A1 values are in cosmology/paper_artifacts/final_validation_summary.json and cosmology/results/tierA1_hubble_result_card.json.

bug_description.issue: The original H0.riess2020 likelihood compared the sampled theory-frame H0 parameter instead of the EDCL observed-frame H0_obs quantity.
bug_description.consequence: The EDCL calibration-drift channel was not tested by that likelihood setup.
bug_description.fix: Use a custom likelihood that compares H0_obs = H0_theory * (1 + delta0) to the local H0 measurement.

historical_results_with_fix.note: These values came from an earlier fixed-likelihood validation stage and should not be quoted as the current manuscript result unless reproduced in the current Tier-A1 result card.

current_claim_discipline.allowed_current_wording: Tier-A1 validates a working H0_obs calibration-drift mechanism and activation/collapse behavior in late-only data.
current_claim_discipline.not_allowed_as_current_Tier_A1_claim: EDCL decisively resolves the Hubble tension.
